description: Juliet Sotnick joined the NWS board in January 2024.   She brings both Sustainability and over 25 years’ commercial experience, most recently, at IHS Towers, one of the largest independent communications infrastructure companies. Prior to this Juliet worked at Babcock International Group as Chief Sustainability Officer and Chief Procurement & Supply Chain Officer. She has also operated as Group Head of Procurement at Sky plc., Managing Director at Bear Stearns & Co., New York, USA and as a management consultant at PwC in New York. Juliet holds an MBA from New York University and the Executive Education for Sustainability Leadership programme at Harvard University.  She is an accredited executive coach and is a Global Trustee at the Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply.

details.body:
Juliet Sotnick joined the NWS board in January 2024.  

She brings both Sustainability and over 25 years’ commercial experience, most recently, at IHS Towers, one of the largest independent communications infrastructure companies. Prior to this Juliet worked at Babcock International Group as Chief Sustainability Officer and Chief Procurement & Supply Chain Officer. She has also operated as Group Head of Procurement at Sky plc., Managing Director at Bear Stearns & Co., New York, USA and as a management consultant at PwC in New York.

Juliet holds an MBA from New York University and the Executive Education for Sustainability Leadership programme at Harvard University.  She is an accredited executive coach and is a Global Trustee at the Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply.

Juliet holds an MBA from New York University and the Executive Education for Sustainability Leadership programme at Harvard University.  She is an accredited executive coach and is a Global Trustee at the Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply.
